title: pleopeltis spuria
intro: Pleopeltis spuria, also known as the spore-bearing polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis spuria include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea from its leaves or using it in a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
